productDisplayName: Puma Women Exsis White Silver Black Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during runs with these Cell Exsis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays to provide a high degree of breathability and stability Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for stability and style Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for plush feel Midsole EVA provides cushioning and improved shock absorption Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorption EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas Aggressive pattern with flex grooves to allow more flexibility to the feet
